mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID, USER_NM, DEPT_CD, EMAIL, PWD, ROLE_ID, USE_CCD, REG_DT FROM C_USER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND USE_CCD = 'Y'
SELECT USER_ID, USER_NM, DEPT_CD, EMAIL, PWD, ROLE_ID, USE_CCD, REG_DT FROM C_USER WHERE USE_CCD = 'Y' ORDER BY USER_ID
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO C_USER (USER_ID, USER_NM, DEPT_CD, EMAIL, PWD, ROLE_ID, USE_CCD) VALUES (#{userId}, #{userNm}, #{deptCd}, #{email}, #{pwd}, #{roleCd}, #{useYn})
mapper.update: UPDATE C_USER SET USER_NM = #{userNm}, DEPT_CD = #{deptCd}, EMAIL = #{email}, ROLE_ID = #{roleCd}, USE_CCD = #{useYn} WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
